popupModalp1: This website is a demonstration project.
popupModalp2: Any information you enter (including the payment form) is not sent to or stored on any server. Data may exist temporarily only in your browser so the demo can work.
popupModalp3: Please do not enter real personal or payment information. Use test or fake data only.
popupModalp4: The images used on this website are generated by AI and are used only for illustrative purposes. They do not represent real products, meals, or photos.
thankYouMessage: Thanks, {customer-name}! Your order is on its way.
ratingModalQuestion: How was your experience with us?
